description: Add a home screen widget to the existing WeatherApp project. The implementation must include a layout file at app/src/main/res/layout/widget_weather.xml with TextView IDs widget_city_name, widget_temperature, and widget_condition. The widget metadata must be defined in app/src/main/res/xml/weather_widget_info.xml using an <appwidget-provider> with minWidth 180dp, minHeight 60dp, and updatePeriodMillis 1800000. The provider class app/src/main/java/com/example/weatherapp/WeatherWidgetProvider.kt should extend AppWidgetProvider and override onUpdate to update the text using RemoteViews. The widget must be registered in AndroidManifest.xml with the android.appwidget.action.APPWIDGET_UPDATE intent filter and the metadata. The project must build successfully upon completion.
